title: Connection Status
expected: Connection status shows "Connected" with a green dot
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Counter Increment
expected: Event log shows `call → increment()` followed by `result ←`
"Current State" JSON updates with new counter value
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Counter Decrement
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Set Counter (Server)
action: Enter `42` in the number input, click **Set (Server)**
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Set Counter (Client)
action: Enter `100` in the number input, click **Set (Client)**
expected: Log shows `setState →` (client-side update, no server call)
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Add Item
action: Type "Test Item" in the New Item input, click **Add**
expected: Item appears in the Items list
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Remove Item
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Reset State
expected: Counter returns to 0, items list clears
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Multi-Tab Sync
action: Open the same URL in a new tab, modify state in one tab
expected: Both tabs show the same state (real-time sync)
notes: Tests real-time state synchronization between server and clients.

title: Math Operations
notes: Tests the `@callable` decorator and RPC functionality.

title: Multiply
notes: Tests the `@callable` decorator and RPC functionality.

title: Echo
notes: Tests the `@callable` decorator and RPC functionality.

title: Async Operation
notes: Tests the `@callable` decorator and RPC functionality.

title: Error Handling

title: Get Timestamp
notes: Tests the `@callable` decorator and RPC functionality.

title: List Methods

title: Stream Numbers
expected: Chunks appear one by one: `{"number":1}`, `{"number":2}`, etc.
notes: Tests streaming responses from agent to client.

title: Countdown with Delay
expected: Numbers stream in with ~500ms delay between each
notes: Tests streaming responses from agent to client.

title: Stream with Error
action: Set "Error after" to `3`, click **Error after 3 chunks**
notes: Tests streaming responses from agent to client.

title: Button State During Stream
expected: Button shows "Streaming..." and is disabled until complete
notes: Tests streaming responses from agent to client.

title: One-Time Task
action: Set delay to `5` seconds, enter a message, click **Schedule Task**
expected: After 5 seconds, log shows `schedule_executed ←` with the message
notes: Tests delayed and recurring task scheduling.

title: Recurring Task
action: Set interval to `10` seconds, enter a label, click **Schedule Recurring**
notes: Tests delayed and recurring task scheduling.

title: Cancel Task
action: Click **Cancel** next to an active schedule
notes: Tests delayed and recurring task scheduling.

title: Refresh Schedules
notes: Tests delayed and recurring task scheduling.

title: Connection Count
notes: Tests WebSocket connection management and broadcasting.

title: Multi-Tab Count
action: Click **Open New Tab** (or manually open another tab to same URL)
expected: Both tabs update to show `2` connected clients
notes: Tests WebSocket connection management and broadcasting.

title: Broadcast Message
expected: Message appears in "Received Broadcasts" on ALL connected tabs
notes: Tests WebSocket connection management and broadcasting.

title: Tab Close
expected: Remaining tab updates to show `1` connected client
notes: Tests WebSocket connection management and broadcasting.

title: List Tables
notes: Tests direct SQL interaction with agent's SQLite database.

title: View Table Schema
expected: Schema card shows columns, types, and nullability
Query input updates to `SELECT * FROM cf_agents_state LIMIT 10`
notes: Tests direct SQL interaction with agent's SQLite database.

title: Execute Query
expected: Results card shows query results as JSON
notes: Tests direct SQL interaction with agent's SQLite database.

title: Insert Custom Data
action: Enter a key (e.g., "test-key") and value (e.g., "test-value"), click **Insert**
expected: Record appears in the Custom Data list below
notes: Tests direct SQL interaction with agent's SQLite database.

title: Per-User Strategy
action: Open a new tab with the same User ID
expected: Both tabs connect to the same agent instance
notes: Tests different agent naming patterns.

title: Change User ID
action: Change User ID to something different
expected: Connection count resets to `1` (you're now on a different agent)
notes: Tests different agent naming patterns.

title: Shared Strategy
expected: All tabs with Shared strategy connect to the same agent
notes: Tests different agent naming patterns.

title: Per-Session Strategy
expected: Each tab connects to a different agent (based on session ID)
Opening new tab creates new session = new agent
notes: Tests different agent naming patterns.

title: Strategy Persistence
action: Change User ID, refresh the page
notes: Tests different agent naming patterns.

title: Connection
expected: Connection status shows "Connected", stats show 0 children
notes: Tests the manager-child agent pattern using `getAgentByName()`.

title: Create Child
expected: New child card appears with ID like `child-abc123`
notes: Tests the manager-child agent pattern using `getAgentByName()`.

title: Increment Single Child
notes: Tests the manager-child agent pattern using `getAgentByName()`.

title: Increment All
action: Create multiple children, click **+1 to All**
expected: Total Counter updates to sum of all counters

title: Remove Child
action: Click the **×** button on a child card
notes: Tests the manager-child agent pattern using `getAgentByName()`.

title: Clear All
notes: Tests the manager-child agent pattern using `getAgentByName()`.

title: Persistence
expected: Children are preserved (supervisor tracks IDs in state)
notes: Tests the manager-child agent pattern using `getAgentByName()`.

expected: Room header shows "0 members" initially, then "1 members"
notes: Tests multi-agent chat with Lobby and Room agents.

title: Send Message
action: Type a message, press Enter or click **Send**
expected: Your messages appear on the right with dark background
notes: Tests multi-agent chat with Lobby and Room agents.

title: Multi-User Chat
action: Click link to open new tab (or manually open same URL)
In new tab, set different username
expected: Both users see each other's messages in real-time
Member count updates in lobby room list
notes: Tests multi-agent chat with Lobby and Room agents.

title: Leave Room
expected: Chat area returns to "Select a room to start chatting"
Member count decreases for that room
notes: Tests multi-agent chat with Lobby and Room agents.

title: Room Persistence
notes: Tests multi-agent chat with Lobby and Room agents.

title: Connection
expected: Connection status shows "Connected", no workflows running
notes: Interactive demo that simulates multi-step workflow execution with automatic step progression.

title: Start Workflow
action: Enter a workflow name (e.g., "Data Processing"), set step count to 4, click **Start Workflow**
expected: Visual step pipeline shows Step 1 as running (spinner icon)
notes: Interactive demo that simulates multi-step workflow execution with automatic step progression.

title: Watch Step Progression
expected: Steps complete one by one (1-2 seconds each)
Completed steps show checkmark, current step shows spinner
Connection lines turn solid as steps complete
Event log shows `workflow_step_complete ←` for each step
notes: Interactive demo that simulates multi-step workflow execution with automatic step progression.

title: Start Multiple Workflows
expected: All workflows appear in Running section
Completed workflows move to History section
notes: Interactive demo that simulates multi-step workflow execution with automatic step progression.

title: Cancel Workflow
action: Start a workflow, then click the X button before it completes
notes: Interactive demo that simulates multi-step workflow execution with automatic step progression.

title: Clear History
action: After some workflows complete, click **Clear** in the History section
notes: Interactive demo that simulates multi-step workflow execution with automatic step progression.

title: Connection
expected: Connection status shows "Connected", no pending approvals
notes: Interactive demo that simulates human-in-the-loop approval patterns.

title: Submit Approval Request
action: Enter a title and description, click **Submit Request**
expected: Request appears in "Pending Approval" section with yellow indicator
notes: Interactive demo that simulates human-in-the-loop approval patterns.

title: Use Quick Presets
action: Click one of the preset request buttons (e.g., "Deploy v2.0 to Production")
expected: Title and description fields are populated
notes: Interactive demo that simulates human-in-the-loop approval patterns.

title: Approve Request
expected: Request moves to History with green indicator
notes: Interactive demo that simulates human-in-the-loop approval patterns.

title: Reject Request
expected: After clicking "Confirm Reject", request moves to History with red indicator
notes: Interactive demo that simulates human-in-the-loop approval patterns.

title: Multiple Pending Requests
expected: All appear in Pending Approval section
notes: Interactive demo that simulates human-in-the-loop approval patterns.

title: Clear History
action: Resolve several requests, then click **Clear** in History
expected: Resolved requests are removed from History
notes: Interactive demo that simulates human-in-the-loop approval patterns.

title: Connection
expected: Connection status shows "Connected", Inbox/Outbox tabs visible, stats show 0
notes: Tests HMAC-signed email replies for secure routing.

title: Inbox/Outbox Tabs
expected: Tab content switches, counts shown in tab labels
notes: Tests HMAC-signed email replies for secure routing.

title: Toggle Auto-Reply
action: Toggle the "Auto-reply with signed headers" switch
notes: Tests HMAC-signed email replies for secure routing.

title: Receive Email with Auto-Reply (Deployed Only)
action: Send an email to `secure+demo@yourdomain.com` with auto-reply enabled
expected: Signed reply appears in Outbox with green checkmark
notes: Tests HMAC-signed email replies for secure routing.

title: View Signed Reply
action: Switch to Outbox tab, click on a reply
notes: Tests HMAC-signed email replies for secure routing.

title: Secure Reply Routing (Deployed Only)
action: Reply to a signed email from your email client
expected: Reply is routed back to the same agent instance
Email shows lock icon indicating "Secure Reply"
notes: Tests HMAC-signed email replies for secure routing.

title: Clear Emails
expected: Both inbox and outbox are cleared
notes: Tests HMAC-signed email replies for secure routing.

title: Dual Panel Layout
expected: Two side-by-side panels — "Editor (read-write)" on the left, "Viewer (readonly)" on the right
notes: Tests read-only WebSocket connections that can observe but not modify state.

title: Editor Increment
expected: Counter increases on BOTH panels (state syncs to viewer)
"Last updated by" shows the update source
notes: Tests read-only WebSocket connections that can observe but not modify state.

title: Viewer Blocked (Callable)
expected: Error toast appears — readonly connections cannot call methods that write state
notes: Tests read-only WebSocket connections that can observe but not modify state.

title: Viewer Blocked (Client setState)
expected: Error toast appears — client-side setState is also blocked for readonly connections
notes: Tests read-only WebSocket connections that can observe but not modify state.

title: Check Permissions (Always Allowed)
action: Click **Check Permissions** on the Viewer panel
expected: Info toast shows `canEdit = false` — non-mutating RPCs work on readonly connections
notes: Tests read-only WebSocket connections that can observe but not modify state.

title: Toggle Readonly
action: Uncheck the **Lock** checkbox on the Viewer panel
expected: Viewer can now increment and modify state
notes: Tests read-only WebSocket connections that can observe but not modify state.

title: Flaky Operation (Succeeds)
action: Set "Succeed on attempt" to `3`, click **Run Flaky Operation**
notes: Tests retry operations with exponential backoff and selective retry.

title: Flaky Operation (Exhausted)
action: Set "Succeed on attempt" to `10`, click **Run Flaky Operation**
expected: Log shows attempts failing (class default is 4 max attempts)
Final error after all retries exhausted
notes: Tests retry operations with exponential backoff and selective retry.

title: Selective Retry (Transient)
action: Set "Failures before success" to `2`, leave "Permanent error" unchecked, click **Run Filtered Retry**
notes: Tests retry operations with exponential backoff and selective retry.

title: Selective Retry (Permanent)
expected: No retries — error appears after first attempt
notes: Tests retry operations with exponential backoff and selective retry.

title: Queue with Retry
expected: Task is queued (log shows queued ID)
Retry attempts stream in via log messages
notes: Tests retry operations with exponential backoff and selective retry.

title: Clear Logs
notes: Tests retry operations with exponential backoff and selective retry.
